$schema_note: B1 retrieval-quality eval baseline (Task 7 structure; Task 11 metric values). Consumed by eval/rag/harness/verdict.ts via the BaselineConfig shape: { metrics, bands }. The `metrics` values are the per-metric baseline on the CURRENT production retrieval settings (RRF k=60, MMR lambda=0.7, fetch-N=40, floor=0.5 via retrieve(), Voyage voyage-3 embeddings + voyage-rerank-2 (API id 'rerank-2'), Sonnet/Haiku groundedness judge). The `bands` are the A7 per-metric regress bands (spec section B1.5).
settings_note: Baseline measured on production settings on 2026-06-14: retrieve() with RRF k=60, MMR lambda=0.7, fetch-N=40 (candidateCount=40, limit=20), p_min_quality floor=0.5, Voyage voyage-3 embeddings + voyage-rerank-2 (API identifier 'rerank-2'), against the live rag_content_chunks corpus (source='ncert_2025', project shktyoxqhundlvkiwguu) using golden set ncert-golden-v1.json (30 items, 3 grade-bands x 2 subjects each). Groundedness was measured with the Sonnet/Haiku grounding-check judge (offline-run timeout 30s, 0 timeouts). A baseline refresh is an explicit, reviewed action (re-run on current settings + commit) — NEVER automatic, so the gate cannot silently rebaseline a regression away.
bands_note: A7 per-metric regress bands (spec section B1.5). RELATIVE bands trip when drop > band*baseline; ABSOLUTE bands are percentage points (2pp = 0.02) and trip when drop > band. These bands are ASSESSMENT-REVIEWED and NEVER AUTO-REFRESHED. Changing any band value requires assessment review on the baseline file. The band STRUCTURE and VALUES are assessment-owned (A7) and were NOT modified by the Task 11 metric-population run.
placeholder_note: Populated 2026-06-14 by a reviewed full-path harness run (npm run eval:rag:harness) against production settings on golden set ncert-golden-v1.json. The run was genuinely full-path (full_path=true, degraded=false): VOYAGE_API_KEY present, Voyage rerank-2 actually executed (reranked=true on every item whose candidate pool exceeded the limit; items with pool<=limit legitimately skip rerank), zero retrieve errors, zero unmeasurable items, zero excluded items, 0/30 query-less. These metric values ARE a real measurement and MAY be used to gate B2 tuning decisions. A re-run with identical current settings yields verdict=PASS against this baseline (self-check confirmed).
